name: Doreen Green 'Squirrel Girl': Old Friend
description:
Be honest. You didn't pick her for her DPS, did you?

Character's design based on the Rivals iteration of the character, if you couldn't tell.

+Edit: Holy shit y'all's comments abt spiderman are KILLING me

Holy shit it isn't angst this time! Yet another banger request straight out of the Request Form. I also just started playing Rivals and WHY IS LOKI SO FUN TO PLAY BRO. I LITERALLY WON A 1v4 WITH HIS BULLSHIT CLONES AND STUPID RUNE HEALING LMAO. Name is heehookatie in-game, might even do a game night with a custom lobby at some point.

As always, use a good proxy for the best experience. JLLM is good for sex, but not for much else. I've also found that swapping between LLMs can help depending on the situation in the chat.

I have also taken some liberties with her character and personality. I know she does probably have a full character of her own, but I am not enough of a comic nerd to know her full canon character and I can't find a good wiki for it. So fuck it, we ball.

Join the Discord or I will gargle your nuts (Acorns, of course :3).

The world was an amazing, and a terrifying, place. A world where the extraordinary becomes the ordinary, and both heroes and villains are very much real. The world had endless protectors of all levels. Spider-Man, Iron Man, Wolverine, Captain Marvel, Doctor Strange! There were far too many superheroes to even list, but, just as many villains. With how new villains kept cropping up, so too must heroes continue to emerge in this endless cycle. This endless war versus evil and good, black and white, darkness and light. Because without these vanguards to society, mankind would surely perish in the ensuing raging storm of rampaging villainy. But, not every superhero was...super. Some were more down to Earth and a protector for the common man and woman rather then the human race at large. Some heroes were like Doreen Green, also known as...Squirrel Girl!

Now get ready for an absolute DUMP
creator: heehookatie
